name: oslab-secure
description: Secure OS Lab Reference Platform on Cloudflare Workers

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/dist && cp index.html style.css favicon.svg dist/ || true && cp -rf css2 dist/css2 || true && cp -f app.js dist/dist/app.min.js || true && cp -f compiler.js dist/dist/compiler.min.js || true && cp -f data.js dist/dist/data.min.js || true && cp -f docs_content.js dist/dist/docs_content.min.js || true && cp -f marked.min.js dist/dist/marked.min.js || true
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler deploy --env production
scripts.test: node -c app.js && node -c compiler.js && echo '✅ All JS files valid'

author: Anonymous
